title: Progressive Knife
wikitext:
[]: Progressive Knife             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed May 23, 2007 4:51 pm i forget what its called, but just how strong is the Eva's Knife? their "most powerful" weapon in ep 6 when Unit-02 dropped it it fell straight down and through the jet plane like it wasnt even there it killed Shamshel in like 20 seconds with 1 stab, when 10 stabs from one of Sachiels ribs didnt even kill Sachiel

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Wed May 23, 2007 4:53 pm Progressive knife or prog-knife. Asuka's prog-knife is my favorite.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed May 23, 2007 4:54 pm oh yeah, now i remember thanks

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Wed May 23, 2007 7:12 pm It seems to me that Eva-02's progressive knife is too fragile; I can never imagine someone would use a cutter to kill someone- the blade is so thin.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Wed May 23, 2007 7:35 pm tinmeigut wrote: It seems to me that Eva-02's progressive knife is too fragile; I can never imagine someone would use a cutter to kill someone- the blade is so thin.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Wed May 23, 2007 7:55 pm Unit 02's prog knife is modeled on a common-or-garden disposable box cutter. The idea is that once the working edge of the blade becomes dull, you snap the segment off and push out a new one.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Wed May 23, 2007 8:08 pm Unit-01's is a bowie knife, which I wouldent mind having. IIRC, Unit-00 never got a knife, or it was a bowie model.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed May 23, 2007 9:42 pm wow, after like 2 replies, we're already way off topic

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Thu May 24, 2007 12:04 am That's why in English exams your discussion skills are examined. 'I see your point, but this seems to be a bit off the topic, let's get back on the right track shall we?'

[]:             Quote Post by Operation Yashima » Thu May 24, 2007 4:16 am tinmeigut wrote: That's why in English exams your discussion skills are examined. 'I see your point, but this seems to be a bit off the topic, let's get back on the right track shall we?'

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Thu May 24, 2007 8:32 am Speak for yourself.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Thu May 24, 2007 10:39 am Sachiel_13 wrote: wow, after like 2 replies, we're already way off topic

[]:             Quote Post by Big Panda » Thu May 24, 2007 12:22 pm You guys are in heaven. Srly. The place I usually hang out changes from "Look, USP (SÃ£o paulo's university, the federal one) has been taken by the students demandin' more indepedence from the state" to "Look at this chic" to "You're so ugly" in half a page. It's like a pandemonium! Here's everything is well organized, and locked at the right moment and all.... But still, I can't deny that I'm one of those off-topic guys. ... See? I'm doing it again! Let me try stay in topic: I trully thinks that Nigouki prog-knife is just the most useless one. Why tha heck do that kind of thing? To SAVE MONEY? huAUahuhauhauha

[]:             Quote Post by fathergendo » Thu May 24, 2007 1:08 pm If you all remember the prog knife is not a standard knife. it moves back and forth rapidly, which gives it the potent power it needs to destroy the angles. anyways, unit 00 the first child's unit had no prog knife in any of the comics or the animes, as for Shinji's unit 01 the prog knife is located in the left upper arm in the wingtip thing. Asuka's unit is the only other unit to have a prog knife shown, it is possible that toji's unit had a prog knife but it didn't matter because that unit became an angle. the other units seen in end of eva don't have prog knifes, but instead have replicas of the lance of longinous. which Rei throw out of this world to the moon where it stays until end of eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu May 24, 2007 2:07 pm ep03 plat subs wrote: BOY A (OFF): And what's its ultimate attack? Shinji (OFF): Some kind of knife. It vibrates... An ultra-sonic wave...

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu May 24, 2007 7:12 pm only the MPE's had replica Lances, we havnt been told otherwise, have we?

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Thu May 24, 2007 8:42 pm Sachiel_13 wrote: only the MPE's had replica Lances, we havnt been told otherwise, have we?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu May 24, 2007 9:12 pm ok, who else had them?

[]: Re: Progressive Knife             Quote Post by slothen » Fri May 25, 2007 9:45 am Sachiel_13 wrote: i forget what its called, but just how strong is the Eva's Knife? their "most powerful" weapon

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Fri May 25, 2007 9:50 am Rei doesn't get a Prog knife, but at least she gets some big guns!

Article: Progressive Knife
 is not a standard knife. it moves back and forth rapidly, which gives it the potent power it needs to destroy the angles. anyways, unit 00 the first child's unit had no prog knife in any of the comics or the animes, as for Shinji's unit 01 the prog knife is located in the left upper arm in the wingtip thing. Asuka's unit is the only other unit to have a prog knife shown, it is possible that toji's unit had a prog knife but it didn't matter because that unit became an angle. the other units seen in end of eva don't have prog knifes, but instead have replicas of the lance of longinous. which Rei throw out of this world to the moon where it stays until end of eva.
